pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in newer JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind is removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+ and often requires explicit dependency management; migrating to jakarta.xml.bind ensures compatibility with modern Jakarta EE standards and avoids potential classpath conflicts or deprecation warnings in Java 21 environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer required or is replaced by Jakarta equivalents in Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in favor of jakarta.annotation-api in modern Java ecosystems; keeping it may cause conflicts or is unnecessary if the codebase has migrated to Jakarta annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
Update maven-checkstyle-plugin version to a newer snapshot.
Update jacoco.version to a newer snapshot.
Update lombok.version to a newer version.
Update javax.annotation-api.version property to a newer version.
Update commons-codec.version to a newer snapshot.
Update jaxb-api.version property to a newer version.
